players.name: Johny Placide
players.bio: Johny Placide (born 29 January 1988) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 2 club Bastia. Born in France, he plays for and captains the Haiti national team since 2011.

players.name: Carlens Arcus
players.bio:
Carlens Arcus (born 28 June 1996) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Ligue 1 club Angers and the Haiti national team.

Club career
When Arcus was about 15–16 years of age, he travelled to São Paulo, Brazil, and played for a Série D club, where he learned Portuguese. In 2014, he returned to Haiti and played for top-tier Racing Club Haïtien and then for Club Sportif Saint-Louis of the second division.

Arcus played for Troyes in Ligue 1 in 2015, until signing w

players.name: Keeto Thermoncy
players.bio: Keeto Thermoncy (born 29 March 2006) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for the U21 team of Young Boys in the Promotion League. Born in Switzerland, he plays for the Haiti national team.

players.name: Ricardo Adé
players.bio:
Ricardo Adé Kat (born 21 May 1990) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Ecuadorian club L.D.U. Quito and the Haiti national team.

Career
Adé intended to play in Thailand but he was victim of a fraud when the agent abandoned him while in Thailand. Since he couldn't play in Thailand, Adé moved to the United States and started playing for Miami United.

In 2017, Adé went to Santiago Morning. In his first season, he played 23 matches and scored 1 goal. An agent sent

players.name: Hannes Delcroix
players.bio: Hannes Piterson Delcroix (born 28 February 1999) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Swiss Super League club Lugano. Born in Haiti, he played for the Belgium national team once before switching to his birth country of Haiti.
players.birth_location: Petite Rivière de l Artibonite, Haiti

players.name: Carl Sainté
players.bio: Carl Fred Sainté (born 9 August 2002) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for USL Championship club El Paso Locomotive and the Haiti national team.

players.name: Derrick Etienne Jr.
players.bio:
Derrick Burckley Etienne Jr. (born 25 November 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Toronto FC in Major League Soccer. Born in the United States, he plays for the Haiti national team.

Born in Richmond, Virginia, and raised in Paterson, New Jersey, Etienne is the son of former Haitian International and Long Island Rough Riders forward Derrick Etienne and the older brother of Haitian International midfielder Danielle Etienne.

players.name: Martin Expérience
players.bio: Martin Yves Expérience (born 9 March 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back for French Ligue 2 club Nancy. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.

players.name: Duckens Nazon
players.bio: Duckens Moïse Nazon (born 7 April 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for Persian Gulf Pro League club Esteghlal. He is also the all-time top goalscorer for the Haiti national team, with 44 goals.

players.name: Jean-Ricner Bellegarde
players.bio: Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (French pronunciation: ; born 27 June 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Wolverhampton Wanderers. Born in France, he represents the Haiti national team.

players.name: Louicius Deedson
players.bio: Don Deedson Louicius (born 11 February 2001), commonly known as Louicius Deedson, is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a right winger for MLS club FC Dallas and the Haiti national team.

players.name: Alexandre Pierre
players.bio: Alexandre Pierre (born 25 February 2001 in France) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Championnat National club Sochaux. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.

players.name: Duke Lacroix
players.bio: Markhus "Duke" Lacroix (born October 14, 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a full-back for Colorado Springs Switchbacks in the USL Championship. Born in the United States, he plays for the Haiti national team.
players.birth_location: New Egypt, New Jersey, United States

players.name: Ruben Providence
players.bio: Ruben Fritzner Providence (born 7 July 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger or forward for Dutch Eerste Divisie club Almere City. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.

players.name: Lenny Joseph
players.bio: Lenny Joseph (born 12 October 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward for Hungarian club Ferencváros.

players.name: Danley Jean Jacques
players.bio:
Danley Jean Jacques (born 20 May 2000) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Philadelphia Union and the Haiti national team. 

Club career
Jean Jacques is a youth product of the Haitian club Don Bosco, and began his senior career with them in 2015 making 52 appearances with them, scoring 7 goals. He moved to the reserves of Metz in August 2021. On 7 June 2022, he signed a professional contract with Metz keeping him at the club until June 2

players.name: Wilson Isidor
players.bio: Wilson Isidor (born 27 August 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Sunderland. Born in France, he represents the Haiti national team.

players.name: Yassin Fortuné
players.bio: Yassin Enzo Fortuné (born 30 January 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Liga Portugal 2 club Vizela. Born in France, he represents the Haiti national team.

players.name: Frantzdy Pierrot
players.bio: Frantzdy Pierrot (born 29 March 1995) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Süper Lig club Çaykur Rizespor, on loan from AEK Athens, and the Haiti national team.

players.name: Josué Casimir
players.bio: Josué Casimir (born 24 September 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back, right wing-back or striker for French Ligue 1 club Auxerre. Born in Guadeloupe, he represents the Haiti national team.

players.name: Jean-Kévin Duverne
players.bio:
Jean-Kévin Duverne (born 12 July 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Belgian Pro League club Gent on loan from French club Nantes. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team. 
Duverne made his RC Lens first team debut on 5 August 2016 against Tours FC.  On 17 May 2018, he was called up to represent the France national under-20 football team at the 2018 Toulon Tournament.

players.name: Josué Duverger
players.bio: Josué Duverger (born 27 April 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Rheinlandliga club Cosmos Koblenz. Born in Canada, he plays for the Haiti national team.

players.name: Wilguens Paugain
players.bio: Wilguens Raphael Polynice Paugain (born 24 August 2001) is a Haitian professional football player who plays as right-back for Zulte Waregem.  A former youth international for France, he plays for the Haiti national team.

players.name: Woodensky Pierre
players.bio:
Olivier Woodensky Pierre (born 30 December 2004) is a prominent 21-year-old Haitian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Violette AC in the Ligue Haïtienne and represents the Haiti national football team.
He has made historic headlines as the only domestic-based player selected for Haiti's final 26-man squad heading to the 2026 FIFA World Cup
